title: Lab: Publish a Training-Video Library
summary: Lab: Publish a Training-Video Library uses an original training video library handoff scenario to retrieve earlier HTML skills, add a bounded artifact layer, and verify transfer with source and browser evidence.
objectives: Retrieve html video, html iframe, html links urls without step-by-step imitation.
Produce and verify a real training video library handoff artifact or evidence report.
Preserve earlier valid requirements while diagnosing changed content and constraints.

starterFiles.html: <!-- Build the public information artifact here. -->

steps.title: Triage the training video library handoff · lab
steps.instruction: Checkpoint 1: Which observation identifies the highest-value source boundary to test first? Work context: training video library handoff.
steps.why: Lab: Publish a Training-Video Library requires this decision because each decision must preserve document meaning, user control, portability, and inspectable evidence. This is checkpoint 1 in the training video library handoff.

content.title: training video library handoff · evidence decision
content.text: Commit before feedback, then connect the selected claim to the training video library handoff evidence.

hints: Lab: Publish a Training-Video Library: first isolate the evidence required by “Triage the training video library handoff.”
Lab: Publish a Training-Video Library: compare the current artifact with the named predict goal for step 1.
Lab: Publish a Training-Video Library: use the smallest defensible change or claim that satisfies “Triage the training video library handoff.”

options.text: Training video library handoff case 1: muted autoplay is the only reliable way to make a public briefing accessible.
Training video library handoff case 1: the player needs controls, supported sources, a caption track, fallback, and equivalent text access.
Training video library handoff case 1: the poster image supplies captions while the video is playing.

content.text: Reconstruct the training video library handoff sequence by dependency, not by how familiar each term looks.

training video library handoff phase 5.3: change the smallest root-cause relationship
training video library handoff phase 5.4: rerun the complete requirement set
